name: Pineapple Cheesecake Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix Panko crumbs with the Cream cheese, sugar, and eggs until smooth and fluffy.
3. Stir in the pineapple juice. Pour the mixture over a hot crust.
4. Bake just until the center is set, about 20 minutes.
5. Cool completely.
6. In a saucepan, mix flour and 1/4 cup sugar with the pineapple juice. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly.
7. Boil and stir for 1 minute. Remove from heat; fold in the drained pineapple.
8. Cool completely.
9. Beat whipping cream until stiff. Fold into the pineapple mixture.
10. Spread carefully over the dessert. Cover loosely and refrigerate until firm, about 4 hours.
11. Cut into squares.
